Dubai Electricity and Water Authority (DEWA), in cooperation with the Dubai Environment and Climate Change Authority, plants 700 mangrove trees at the Jebel Ali Marine Sanctuary in 2026, mobilising 254 volunteers who contributed 508 hours of service. The initiative forms part of a wider series of beach clean-up and mangrove planting activities organised since the start of the year to support environmental sustainability and protect marine biodiversity.

RT by @CivilDefenceAD: RT by @CivilDefenceAD: Teams from Abu Dhabi Police and Abu Dhabi Civil Defence Authority have controlled a fire that broke out Friday morning at the Carpet Souk near Zayed Port in Abu Dhabi. Cooling and smoke extraction operations are underway, with no injuries reported, whilst traffic in the area is flowing normally. Abu Dhabi Police urges the public to obtain information from official sources only.
